item.description:
What's New

  • Intro Video Skip Option - Added a visible Continue/Skip button on the intro video screen during onboarding to ensure you can always proceed, even if the video doesn't play to the end.

Bug Fixes

  • Fixed a deadlock that caused the app to freeze completely when cleaning up after a microphone or audio capture launch failure.
  • Resized the Settings window default height so the "Log Out" button is fully visible without needing to scroll or resize, and set a minimum window size.
  • Removed sensitive authentication tokens from being printed in plaintext inside application logs.

Bug Fixes

  • Offline Onboarding Recovery - Fixed an issue where launching the app while offline or during a temporary API network failure could permanently lock the dictation voice pill and incorrectly show "Sign in" in the system tray, even for authenticated users. The app now caches the onboarding status locally and automatically retries status checks with an exponential backoff once the network connection is restored.

Bug Fixes

  • Audio Device Disconnection Reliability - Fixed a critical crash that occurred when physically unplugging or disconnecting an active USB microphone or audio interface (such as a RODECaster Pro) mid-capture during a meeting recording or dictation session. The app now handles device disconnection gracefully and transitions capture to the next-priority available audio device without crashing.
